title: How can GenAI work for you? Learn with BR's certificate program GenAI for legal professionals
description: The legal profession is entering a phase where efficiency is no longer defined by experience alone. Now clients expect quicker turnarounds and teams expect higher output. Tasks, like legal research, drafting, and document review, that once took hours are now being completed faster by integrating Generative AI (GenAI) into the workflow. The result is not just speed but a measurable difference in output.Mastering how to make AI agents work for you around the clock can put you in the top 1% of
